subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in praise of God! Through the bounty of the Lord, the Self-Subsisting, and the unseen yet manifest realm, it is hoped that each one of the beloved of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثناء الله از فضل رب قیوم و غیب معلوم امید چنانست که هر یک از احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
